recentTweets.text:
President Trump is reviving long-debunked conspiracy theories as a pretext to interfere with the next election because he knows Republicans can’t defend their record.
 
It won’t work because we won’t let him. https://t.co/wPo9a6fqht

The Trump Admin targeted blue states by freezing critical child care and social services funding.

I led California House Democrats in calling on the administration to end this reckless attack. After repeated losses in court, they reversed the freeze. A win for families.

President Trump's cruelty is getting people killed. ICE is out of control.

Two people have been shot in the past week during ICE traffic stops. Neither was the target of enforcement.

We need accountability. Stop the traffic stops, stop the roving patrols. Enough is enough. https://t.co/WAtqkK1rVB

While I have consistently supported defensive aid for close American allies, military aid for Israel must include strong conditions to prevent further suffering. This bill applies only to offensive weapons and won’t affect other aid, including funding for the defensive Iron Dome,
Lasting peace will only come through diplomacy and dialogue, but that cannot happen until Israel’s attacks end and civilian lives are protected.
I’m cosponsoring the Block the Bombs Act because I oppose providing offensive weapons to Prime Minister Netanyahu and his far-right government without meaningful safeguards or accountability.
As a mother, I’m heartbroken by the devastating loss of innocent lives and the humanitarian crisis in Gaza, Lebanon and Iran. This cannot continue. 🧵👇
RT @RepAdamSmith: My father, a baggage handler at SeaTac Airport, bought our family home in 1971 for $15,000. Today, that very same house w…

ICE is halting traffic stops after agents killed two people in a week who were not the targets of warrants: Joan Sebastian Guerrero in Maine and Lorenzo Salgado Araujo in Houston.

Two more lives lost due to ICE's recklessness. Their families deserve answers, and the public

ICE is halting traffic stops after agents killed two people in a week who were not the targets of warrants: Joan Sebastian Guerrero in Maine and Lorenzo Salgado Araujo in Houston.

Two more lives lost due to ICE's recklessness. Their families deserve answers, and the public

When storms hit or the lights go out, lineworkers are the first to answer the call.
 
Today, we recognize their hard work, dedication, and sacrifice. I'm proud to lead a resolution designating July 10 as Lineworkers Appreciation Day. https://t.co/I53hEfICoC

Had the opportunity to visit the future YMCA Kolar Family Center and see how construction is coming along. 

It's exciting to watch this project take shape, and I know it will be a great resource for families across Southern California. https://t.co/7A8Xk1LheA

Happy to be at the groundbreaking for the new Smith Park Aquatic Center! 💧

This project is an investment for @PicoRiveraCity and the families who will enjoy this space for generations. Excited to see the progress ahead! https://t.co/KmjV239iwN
Trump right now https://t.co/MibgD95ZDQ

Spain has been a steadfast U.S. ally for decades, hosting American troops and supporting NATO missions from Afghanistan to Kosovo.

President Trump shouldn't be able to weaponize trade powers to retaliate against allies that refused to support his reckless war in Iran.

Today, we celebrate 250 years of America’s enduring promise: that all people are created equal and deserve the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

As we honor our nation’s founding, let’s recommit ourselves to building a more perfect union for generations to come. Happy https://t.co/gMynP6izZ6

Planning your Fourth of July? 🇺🇸

Here's a roundup of Independence Day celebrations happening throughout CA:38. I hope you and your family have a safe, fun, and memorable holiday! https://t.co/ADkW5ViuJh
RT @CenterForwardUS: Trade policy works best when Congress, stakeholders, and industry work together. As the USMCA review begins, read more…
It’s important the administration works to enhance that review mechanism, address the offshoring of jobs to Mexico and push for new reforms, such as a similar environmental Rapid Response Mechanism.

I’m hopeful that this review will be able to seriously take on these issues. But I remain concerned that instead of addressing these priorities which would benefit American workers and help level the playing field, President Trump will use it to extract unrelated demands from
That’s why Congress must have a voice in this review. It’s too important to leave to President Trump alone.

Trade, supply chains and industries evolve, and our trade agreements should evolve with them. Today’s summit is a good sign that all three countries are ready to review and hopefully strengthen the agreement. 🧵
https://t.co/vLD7aiIDE2
When I first voted for it, I did so because of the changes House Democrats were able to make to the agreement, including the landmark labor Rapid Response Mechanism in the USMCA.
Birthright citizenship should never have been up for debate, despite President Trump’s attempt to rewrite the Constitution to serve his extremist agenda. https://t.co/IlW0fpibDk
An independent Federal Reserve is essential to a strong economy. No president should be able to purge officials simply because they refuse to do his political bidding.
This is a huge win for California and every state that believes YOUR vote should count.

The conservative Supreme Court has put thousands of Haitian and Syrian families at risk.

Many have worked, paid taxes, and built lives here. They deserve stability and dignity, not fear and uncertainty.

Four years ago, the conservative Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, stripping millions of women of a fundamental right.

Your healthcare decisions belong to you — not politicians. I'll keep fighting until everyone has the freedom to make their own reproductive care choices.

Trump is holding our bipartisan housing affordability bill hostage over his voter fraud conspiracy theory. Working families need real relief, but the president is too busy throwing yet another temper tantrum. https://t.co/5YruQwClKa

The American people do not want another endless war. Both the House and Senate have voted to block President Trump from restarting his war in Iran.
 
The Constitution is clear: Only Congress, not the president, can declare war.

Freedom is worth celebrating. Freedom is worth protecting. Freedom is worth fighting for. Juneteenth isn’t just about remembering our history and celebrating the promise we’ve made, it’s a call to continue the work. 

Happy Juneteenth! https://t.co/qpawAS7oyz

Recently, I had the pleasure of meeting Jolin Zeng, who earned the Congressional Award Gold Medal, the highest honor Congress bestows on young people for service, personal development, and achievement. 

Congratulations, Jolin, and thank you for representing CA-38 so well! https://t.co/a4Ko7PlnD1

RT @WaysMeansCmte: Higher costs. More chaos. No accountability.

The most corrupt Treasury Department in history has delivered failure afte…

Fourteen years ago, DACA gave Dreamers the chance to build their futures in the only country many have ever called home.

They've strengthened our communities and economy. They deserve certainty, not fear. Congress must pass permanent protections. #DACA
Read more about my bill here: https://t.co/znCbEHFr3K

SSA said this week, Social Security will reach depletion by 2032 if Congress fails to act.

I introduced the Strengthening Social Security Act to raise the payroll cap so the wealthiest pay their fair share – ensuring its long-term stability and your benefits protection. https://t.co/s3CsatsIXf

Inflation is now at a three-year high, forcing Americans to pay more and more just to get by.

Trump's response: “I love it.”

I led my @WaysMeansCmte colleagues in calling for an investigation, and the inspector general confirmed what we all knew: the Trump admin illegally shared the private information of 47,000 taxpayers with DHS.

They broke the law, violated public trust, and weaponized the IRS.
RT @WaysMeansCmte: More from Ranking Member @RepRichardNeal and @RepLindaSanchez: https://t.co/HOC0V26fRT
RT @WaysMeansCmte: For years, Democrats have sounded the alarm about Medicare's hospice payment system creating opportunities for fraud and…

This is a cover-up. I know what I saw at Adelanto. Lack of access to water and medical care. 

The Trump administration is giving ICE even more incentive to dump sick detainees after failing to provide adequate care while in their custody.
https://t.co/ZdLcN5dTvl

The fact is, President Trump's own acting attorney general signed an order granting Trump, his family, his trusts, and his businesses permanent immunity from IRS audits.

And @SecScottBessent doesn't want to talk about it. https://t.co/VFkWZNSlwu
RT @cspan: .@RepLindaSanchez: "Prices on most goods have gone up because of Trump's tariffs, so I don't see how you can call that anything…
.@SecScottBessent the louder you get, the less convincing you sound.

The House just passed a War Powers Resolution to end Trump's war with Iran, joining with the Senate.   
The Constitution is clear: Only Congress, not the president, can declare war.   
Congress has spoken: Trump must end his illegal war now.
There’s still time to vote. Polls close at 8 PM tonight, and if you're in line by 8 PM, you can still cast your ballot. Every vote counts. 🗳️ https://t.co/u5kSqp4JEa

I have been fighting for comprehensive reform that speeds up case processing of cases, reflects our workforce needs, and treats all people with dignity and humanity. https://t.co/gd4uHJP0aY

To everyone in the LGBTQ+ community: you belong, you matter, and I'll always stand with you.
 
Happy Pride! 🏳️‍🌈 https://t.co/HcwiU7cpoT

https://t.co/VrpOKZW0NZ

Pride Month is about celebrating the freedom to be yourself and to love who you love.
 
I'm proud to stand with the LGBTQ+ community in Southern California and across the country as we continue the fight for equality, dignity, and opportunity for all. https://t.co/VTkKIao1VP

There’s a real childcare shortage in this country and low wages are a big reason why.
 
I have been working across the aisle to introduce a bipartisan bill to help pay childcare workers more without adding any more costs for the families who rely on their services. https://t.co/tWWiSoz3R8
It’s the last weekend to vote before California’s June 2 primary. Voting is easy. Return your ballot to an official drop box. Don’t wait. Make your voice heard today. https://t.co/yGuLYt2bxb

This Memorial Day weekend, I joined communities across our district to remember and honor the brave servicemembers who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country.
 
We owe them and their families a debt of gratitude we can never fully repay. https://t.co/6NbcD5n8XF

Today, we honor those who never returned home. The sacrifice they made for our freedom can never be repaid. Instead, we must continue to push to better serve those who served our nation in uniform and their families. https://t.co/egck0LoQll

The toxic chemical leak in Garden Grove is deeply alarming. Over 50,000 residents and businesses have been evacuated amid serious public health and safety concerns. I call on President Trump to immediately approve Governor Newsom’s request for a federal emergency declaration.

The reality is that childcare today is more expensive than college tuition.
 
That is why I introduced the CHILD Act with @RepBice to allow parents to set aside more pre-tax dollars for childcare expenses to help make it more affordable for working families. https://t.co/6kgklFJToT

Every person deserves to be treated with dignity and humanity. The Trump administration must be held accountable.
